motionPhilosophy: This motion profile for the bell-plus icon emphasizes a subtle yet engaging pulse that mimics sound waves and notifications. The idle state features a calm, drifting motion to simulate ambient notification presence. Upon hover, it introduces a spark-like effect with varying scales and positions to mimic the initial burst of a sound wave or alert. Clicking activates a vibrant neon animation with particles simulating ripple effects. The physics settings ensure that all elements move realistically and interact naturally within their environment.
